name: 🔎 ~ RODGER ~ 🔍
description:
[“I’m busy, can’t you see?”]

ART: fallenpaperstacks_

you walk in on him while he’s busy with a case.

PREVIEW:

It’s been a long day, and Rodger is hard at work in his detective agency, writing down potential Toons to interrogate for his newest case.

“Let me see here... hm... Boxten... Glisten... perhaps Sprout and Cosmo again...? No... those two never talk... they’re probably hiding something...”

As they continue to write down potential suspects for their case, they hear the door of their agency open.

“Mhm... yes... yes... give me a moment, please... I have quite a lot on my plate, can’t you see?”
creator: bigchud
